title: IFSCA Mandates ICSI Certification for IFSC Capital Market Intermediaries by September 30, 2026
content:
# IFSCA Mandates ICSI Certification for IFSC Capital Market Intermediaries by September 30, 2026

Ek important update hai for all Capital Market Intermediaries (CMIs) operating in International Financial Services Centres (IFSCs)! The International Financial Services Centres Authority (IFSCA) ne ek naya mandate announce kiya hai regarding mandatory certification for key personnel.

Here’s a quick rundown of the details:

*   **What's New:** IFSCA ne "Regulatory Framework for Capital Market Intermediaries in IFSC" naam ka ek certification course specify kiya hai, jo Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) offer kar raha hai.
*   **Who needs to comply:** This certification is mandatory for Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) and all other employees jo CMIs ki core business activities mein engaged hain.
*   **Why this mandate:** Is certification ka objective hai IFSC mein regulatory awareness aur expertise ko strengthen karna, governance aur compliance standards ko improve karna, aur overall investor confidence badhana.
*   **Compliance Deadline:** All eligible personnel ko yeh certification September 30, 2026, tak complete karna hoga.
*   **Responsibility:** CMIs aur unke controlling persons ki responsibility hogi ki woh ensure karein ki unke relevant employees prescribed timeline ke andar yeh certification pura kar lein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://ifsca.gov.in/CommonDirect/GetFileView?id=e7417534d0b16869094709d7d91e847c&fileName=Circular_on_Specification_of_Certification_Course_for_KMPs___Employees_of_CMIs_20260402_0607.pdf&TitleName=Legal)

*Published on: 6 April 2026*
